reasoning_model_1: The model accurately synthesized the text '我相信自己能胜任这份工作，我会全力以赴。' without any errors (00:00-00:05). The fluency is high with natural prosody. Regarding the 'Confidence' dimension (under Cognitive State), the speaker uses a firm, steady tone with clear articulation. The downward inflection at the end of the sentence and the stress on '相信' (believe) and '全力以赴' (go all out) effectively convey a sense of self-assurance and determination. The performance is fully correct, matching the script and the required tone.
reasoning_model_2: The model completely failed to follow the text script. Instead of saying '我相信自己能胜任这份工作，我会全力以赴。', the model generated a significantly expanded and paraphrased version: '我坚信自己完全有能力胜任这份工作，我不仅准备好了，而且会倾尽所有热情与精力，全力以赴把它做到最好。' (00:00-00:08). According to the 'Detailed Scoring Standard', a score of 0 is assigned because the voice content is clearly inconsistent with the script, changing the words entirely despite the tone being expressive.
model_comparison: Model 1 (T1) is the clear winner. It followed the content instructions perfectly and delivered the required 'Confident' tone naturally and effectively. Model 2 (T2), while having a high-quality audio texture and an expressive tone, completely failed the 'Content Accuracy' criterion by rewriting and expanding the text instead of reading the specific sentence requested. As per the global considerations, if the content is incorrect, the model is penalized heavily. T1 receives a perfect score, while T2 receives a 0 for failing the basic script adherence requirement.
